'''鈭歞-d-th-l''' ('''kadadtheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joyn|joyn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joyn|joyn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-d-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadadtheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidadtheloko|thidadtheloko]] || [[word:jidadtheloko|jidadtheloko]] || [[word:shidadtheloko|shidadtheloko]] || [[word:kidadtheloko|kidadtheloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
